execution_result.comparison_error: 比较过程出错: setting an array element with a sequence. The requested array has an inhomogeneous shape after 2 dimensions. The detected shape was (3, 389) + inhomogeneous part.

llm_operation.reason: MindSpore Split仅支持等分（output_num），不支持tf.split的size_list模式；需将num_or_size_splits=[1,1,26494]映射为等效的output_num=3且shape[axis]可被整除，但26496/3=8832，原tf用例实际分割为[1,1,26494]不等长，语义不等价，故需修复为等分场景。
